Railroad Worker Obi:
After that the elders of Dwarves took over. They gave orders to stop building activity.
As the time passed, all constructions, buildings, machines related to the railroad project became mere ruins. However, Dwarves who had given their lives for the great project couldn't rest in peace. Even after death they ferociously tried to finish their work.
But at some point the ghosts realized that nobody was going to finish the work, living Dwarves had abandoned the idea. The realization drew them mad. That's why they started to scare anyone who came to the ruins.
Up until recently, the ghosts did no harm, only shouting and uttering threats. But now they start getting physical form and become more dangerous. Nobody knows why it's happening like that. Some people believe it's because Chaos Power, though other believe it's not that easy and the reason is more complex.
At the moment the ghosts are weak and can physically appear only at a certain time. But if we don't stop them, they'll grow stronger and do much more harm.
